prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学类专业属于医药大类，社会整体热度偏热，临床医学、口腔医 学等医学类专业持续高热，带动药学相关专业关注度；本省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（297258人）略有增加，物理类考生估算约208400人，竞争基数小幅上升；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属东部发达地区，对西南省份考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12091名、2026年大幅扩招26.6%（竞争加剧，位次后移）、考生总数小幅增加、声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次 较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约14000名，区间13500–14500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 12163 → 11766 → 9338 → 12528 → 12091 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant forward shift, followed by a large backward shift in 2024, with a slight rebound in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is approximately 9338–12528, with a baseline of about 12091 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in this province was 70 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 64 in 2024, and 64 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 81, an increase of 17 students (+26.6%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and notably increased competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 88th, fluctuating between 86th and 102nd in recent years. After rising to 86th in 2025, it slightly dropped to 88th in 2026, overall at an upper-middle level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics emerged (a teacher from the School of Science was accused of sexually harassing students), resulting in a somewhat negative reputation evaluation. Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, with an average evaluation and low short video exposure. No obvious records of admission cut-off gaps were observed. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top nationally), and enrollment majors such as Chinese Materia Medica and Pharmacy directly correspond to the flagship disciplines, strongly attracting candidates. Majors like Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering, and Biopharmaceuticals are also closely related to the pharmacy discipline cluster.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy-related majors belong to the medical category, with overall social popularity being relatively high. Clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical majors continue to be highly popular, driving attention to pharmacy-related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in this province is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (297,258). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 208,400, with a slight increase in the competition base. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12091, the significant 26.6% expansion in 2026 (intensified competition, ranking backward shift), a slight increase in total candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14000, with a range of 13500–14500.

- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Clinical Pharmacy

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering Category (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biomedical Data Science
- Pharmaceutical Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13500–14500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy Category, Clinical Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Top Innovation Class/Experimental Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Chinese Materia Medica Category, Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering Category) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<13500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were 2310 → 1976 → 1942 → 2347 → 2353 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings showed a forward trend, but after the new Gaokao in 2024, they significantly shifted backward, and in 2025 they remained roughly stable. Over the past three years, the fluctuation range was approximately 1942–2353, with a baseline of about 2353 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 4 students in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 9 students, an increase of 4 (+80%) compared to 2025, representing a very large expansion, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 88th, with a stable range of 86–102 in recent years. During the 2025 Gaokao cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics emerged, resulting in a somewhat negative reputation assessment. Its Douyin popularity is average, with low short video exposure. Pharmacy (A+) is a top national discipline, but the History Category majors are the Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction), which are weakly related to the core pharmacy discipline, limiting the appeal of the university's disciplinary advantages to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economic Management majors is divided and cautious, while English (Pharmaceutical Direction) is a foreign language major with average popularity. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in the province is about 90,600, a slight increase from 2025 (90,087). China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, offering some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. The number of History Category admissions is very small, so changes in the enrollment plan have a significant impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2353, the significant 80% expansion of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (easing competition and shifting rankings backward), the somewhat negative reputation, and the slight increase in total History Category candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be notably lower than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3452, with a range of 3300–3600.
